system.tags: undead, spirit, magical, hedonistic, cautious, devious, stealthy, exceptional

damage.die: ghostly touch d4 (band, ignores armor) or host's weapon d6 (tags vary)

system.instinct:
to second-guess your decisions
-Manifest a ghostly presence (harmed only by silver or salt)
-Possess an inebriated victim
-Spot a weakness, want, or fear
-Spin plots and falsehoods
